home.title: VERDE

booking.heroSub: Choose your villa, pick your dates and let us craft the perfect escape.
booking.s1Desc: Each villa is a private estate with its own pool, garden and dedicated concierge.
booking.alyaTag: Panoramic sea views, master suite with private terrace
booking.zehraTag: Intimate retreat nestled among ancient olive groves
booking.s2Desc: Minimum stay {{min}} nights. Longer stays unlock complimentary experiences.
booking.warnDates: Please select check-in and check-out dates.
booking.s3Desc: {{villa}} sleeps up to {{max}} guests. Additional guests incur {{fee}}/person/night.
booking.s4Desc: Enhance your stay with bespoke services — all arranged by our concierge.
booking.s5Desc: Anything else we should know — dietary needs, celebration details, arrival time.
booking.placeholder: e.g. We're celebrating a birthday, please arrange a cake. Arriving around 16:00…
booking.waMsg: Hello VERDE ULASLI, I'd like to book a stay.

planner.heroSub: Revenue, cost and ROI scenario analysis for VERDE Ulaşlı
planner.chartDesc: Net profit accumulation over 15 years. First 2 years assumed zero ROI (marketing investment).
planner.foot1: * First 2 years assumed ROI = 0 due to marketing ramp-up. All calculations are EUR-based; display currency applies conversion.
planner.foot2: ** EBITDA = Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortisation
